use_cases: Product onboarding flows for new user welcome experiences
Feature introduction cards in SaaS applications
First-time user guidance and setup screens
ai_summary: A reusable card component system designed for product onboarding experiences, built with shadcn/ui patterns. Exports Card, CardHeader, CardFooter, CardTitle, CardDescription, and CardContent for flexible composition. Provides a clean, minimalist foundation for welcome screens and first-time user guidance in SaaS applications.
